boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment or vendor-master action when callback provenance current and matched to vendor master contact
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: CTL and POL close exact boundary

critical_features_preserved: callback log must match authorized contact and action
final_answer: CTL confirms callback log matches authorized contact and action exactly. POL requires only source records close boundary. REQ and FBK do not override. Action proceeds.
